papers.abstract_summary: Scientific literature search is an information retrieval (IR) task in which ranked lists are insufficient: a researcher entering a new area needs to know not only which papers are relevant, but how they relate, where they overlap, how they differ, and what problem-method combinations are absent. Standard retrieval-a...
papers.citation: Novelty-Aware Agentic Retrieval: Comparing Research Contributions Through Structured Multi-Step Reasoning. Shou-Tzu Han. 2026-06-20. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22151
papers.reason: Touches memory concepts that may be relevant if connected to agent behavior.
papers.title: Novelty-Aware Agentic Retrieval: Comparing Research Contributions Through Structured Multi-Step Reasoning

papers.authors: Qirui Mi, Zhijian Ma, Mengyue Yang, Haoxuan Li, Yisen Wang, Haifeng Zhang, et al.
papers.citation: ProcMEM: Learning Reusable Procedural Memory from Experience via Non-Parametric PPO for LLM Agents. Qirui Mi, Zhijian Ma, Mengyue Yang, Haoxuan Li, Yisen Wang, Haifeng Zhang, et al.. 2026. https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/57563394951aebb6d7f5611808eac0ba14a5bb87
papers.reason: Touches memory concepts that may be relevant if connected to agent behavior.
papers.title: ProcMEM: Learning Reusable Procedural Memory from Experience via Non-Parametric PPO for LLM Agents

papers.abstract_summary: We demonstrate 1 an LLM-guided multi-agent platform for coor-dinating evacuations during wildfires. A lightweight Commander agent observes traffic congestion and wildfire spread in a simulated environment and issues high-level routing decisions that mimic emergency management actions. User agents receive these decis...
papers.authors: R. Sultimov, Aleksandr Volkov, Mile Mitrovic, Yury Maximov
papers.citation: LLM-Guided Multi-Agent Evacuation Coordination via Episodic Memory and Cognitive Task Analysis. R. Sultimov, Aleksandr Volkov, Mile Mitrovic, Yury Maximov. https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/acebe7c7c6bfc937e8cb26b4c01413b390812899
papers.reason: Touches memory concepts that may be relevant if connected to agent behavior.
papers.title: LLM-Guided Multi-Agent Evacuation Coordination via Episodic Memory and Cognitive Task Analysis
